name: Marble Bath Canister Black - Threshold™: Resin Bathroom Accessories, Qtip Jar, Spot Clean Care
description:
Add an attractive look to your bath space or any other area with the Marble Bath Canister from Threshold™. This black bath canister is designed in a round shape with a lid, and features smoke-like white hues for an appealing look. Place this marble bath canister on the counter and add a coordinating marble tray and soap pump to complete the look of your bath space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
